name: CaveLoop
short_description: In the world of Caveloop an evil villain has trapped you in his cave without any clear motive. It is up to you to surmount the scientist and escape the cave. Level up and unlock new weapons. Blast through the enemies with your favorite gun while wearing a neat hat.
detailed_description:
CaveLoop is a short and challenging game. This game is for people who like a challenge, and like to get better and get further in the game. As the player you are stuck in a short loop and each time you restart the loop in a run, then the enemies get randomly more stronger. By enhancing their stats or attacks. You can keep looping the cave until you escape or you can play for a loop count / high score.

In this game you can upgrade your character, unlock new weapons and hats. Become powerful and skilled enough to escape being imprisoned in the Cave.

In general it takes a couple of hours to complete the game and escape. For people who enjoy finding out how far they can get, there is a few more hours of enjoyment.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Swedish, Ukrainian, Danish, Greek, Romanian, Turkish, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
